en_US: Added screen capture support for faster sharing and AI-assisted workflows.
Added quick access to ChatGPT, Claude, web search, and configured websites.
Improved website opening with configurable pop-up behavior.
Release version information and update notes are now displayed more clearly in the app.
Reordered available actions to make commonly used features easier to reach.
Unavailable features are now disabled to prevent accidental selection.
